ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_ingests" (
  "ingest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingestion record */,
  "ingest_csv_filename" TEXT /* The CSV filename used for the ingestion process */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform from which the data is ingested (e.g., GP05MOAS) */,
  "deployment_number" INTEGER /* Deployment identifier for specific data collection */,
  "uframe_route" TEXT /* The route in the uFrame system for data processing */,
  "filename_mask" TEXT /* Filepath pattern indicating the files to be ingested */,
  "number_files" INTEGER /* Total number of files involved in the ingestion */,
  "file_of_today" INTEGER /* Number of files ingested today */,
  "file_less_equal_1k" INTEGER /* Number of files less than or equal to 1KB */,
  "file_greater_1k" INTEGER /* Number of files greater than 1KB */,
  "reference_designator" TEXT /* Reference designator for tracking purposes */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., telemetered, recovered) */,
  "automated_status" TEXT /* Automated ingestion status (e.g., Missing, Available) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ingestion job */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the ingestion process */,
  "ingest_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ingestion process started */,
  "ingest_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ingestion process ended */,
  "ingest_duration" REAL /* Duration of the ingestion process */,
  "total_file_size" REAL /* Total size of all files ingested in this job */,
  "error_messages" TEXT /* Detailed error messages if the ingestion failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ingests_platform FOREIGN KEY ("platform") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ingests_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform used for data collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform capabilities and features */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the platform is deployed */,
  "sensor_types" TEXT /* Types of sensors installed on the platform */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment record */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform used for this deployment */,
  "deployment_number" INTEGER /* Deployment number for tracking the instance */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the deployment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the deployment ended */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location where the deployment took place */,
  "sensor_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of sensors used during this deployment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_status" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file status record */,
  "ingest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data ingestion job this file is associated with */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the file being tracked */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the file (e.g., Successful, Failed) */,
  "ingestion_date" TEXT /* Date of ingestion for the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, JSON, binary) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., ASCII, binary) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Full path where the file is stored */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum value for file integrity verification */,
  "retries" INTEGER /* Number of retries attempted if the ingestion failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_status_ingest_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingest_id") REFERENCES data_ingests ("ingest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., telemetered, recovered) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Location where the data source is located */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, binary) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected from this source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data manager, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user accessing the record */,
  "ingest_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the ingestion record being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ingest_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingest_id") REFERENCES data_ingests ("ingest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
